description: Color documentary photograph with no on-image text or graphic design, showing an operation on an airport tarmac. A line of roughly a dozen men in civilian clothes (hoodies, jeans, sweatshirts) walk single-file up a metal ramp toward the open rear cargo door of a large grey U.S. military transport aircraft (a C-17-style cargo plane). A camouflage-uniformed person stands at the top of the ramp and another person in tan/khaki tactical gear stands at right; a CBP officer in a green uniform with a visible agency patch is at the far right. In the background is a yellow 'JET FUEL' refueling truck with a hazardous-materials placard, and the wing and engine of the aircraft frame the top of the image under an overcast sky. The image carries no slogan, typography, or graphic styling.
